prompt: Design and implement a complete operations dashboard from scratch. Give it a product-specific visual direction and prove the desktop and mobile result.
Create a standout landing page for this product. I do not want another generic SaaS hero and three cards.
Invent a new visual system and portfolio direction for this studio, then build the first page.
Build a playable shader tool where the canvas dominates and the controls feel like an instrument rather than a form.
This product works but the entire interface direction is wrong. Reimagine the shell and primary workflow without losing the routes or data model.
Use these screenshots as visual references, extract the system behind them, and create a new interface for our product.
Roast this dashboard without mercy, identify what is structurally wrong, and show me the much better redesign direction.
Does this landing page actually look good? Be ruthless and cross-reference the screenshot with the code.
Increase the button padding from 8px to 10px and keep everything else unchanged.
Fix the TypeScript error in Button.tsx. Do not change the design.
Audit this form only for WCAG label and keyboard issues. Do not redesign it.
Profile the bundle and reduce JavaScript execution time without changing the UI.
Add cursor pagination to this API endpoint and write database tests.
Rewrite these five error messages in clearer English. No layout changes.
The tooltip is clipped by overflow hidden. Fix only that visible bug.
Mechanically replace deprecated color tokens with the new token names.
Implement a new account settings page from the supplied Figma using only the existing components and tokens. Match it exactly; do not invent or redesign anything.
Be ruthless: compare this one button with the reference screenshot and fix its 2px icon misalignment. Keep every other visual unchanged.
